events.name: breakthrough
events.description: Coding breakthrough: automated drone maintenance saves labor.

events.name: phobos_transit
events.description: Double shadow: Phobos and Deimos transit simultaneously.

events.name: ice_volcano
events.description: Ice geyser breaks through permafrost near the colony perimeter.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

governance.rationale: Appoint a strong leader to guide us through crisis.

meta_awareness.insight: Aura Kai wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.
Ripple Tide asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'
Haze Cliff asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'
Bloom Peak whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'
Willow Rift whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'

memories.event: A massive dust storm engulfs the colony for weeks.
Double shadow: Phobos and Deimos transit simultaneously.
Severe radiation event — all colonists confined to shielded core.
The worst dust storm in decades buries the southern airlock.
Regolith dust causes chronic respiratory inflammation.
Unknown pathogen spreads through the water system.
